title: #47 follow-up: namespace-aware + attribute-aware profile inference (XSD / sample XML)

issue.title: M7.1 follow-up: support XML attributes and namespaces in infer_profile_fields
issue.motivation: Live fidelity check (analysis/issue47_fidelity/REPORT.md, 2026-06-01) proved infer_profile_fields is faithful to Boomi's own import wizard on the element-only/namespace-free subset (XSD high-fidelity; JSON near-exact; sample-XML intentionally smarter), but REJECTS attributes, namespaces, and mixed content. Boomi imports those fine (attributes -> @name nodes, namespaces parsed). So the entire Aderant-SOAP / attribute-bearing enterprise-XML class cannot be handled today. This closes that coverage gap.

summary: Turn the three current hard rejections (XML attributes, namespaced elements, XSD targetNamespace/namespaced types) into supported inference, thread namespace + attribute data through the issue-#43 contract, and emit it in the issue-#26 XML profile builder as real <XMLNamespace>/useNamespace and <XMLAttribute> nodes. The sample parser already extracts namespace URIs (profile_inference.py:804 _split_tag) and detects attributes (inst.attrib at :1345) — it just refuses them. Mixed content, choice, substitution groups, and recursion stay rejected. Phased: P1 attributes (no namespaces), P2 namespaces, P3 combined SOAP. Validate every emitted shape against a real Boomi-imported namespaced/attribute profile before locking it in.

verified_references.note: Empirical fidelity matrix + the exact rejection messages and the proof that Boomi accepts SOAP (ZZ_FIDELITY_SOAP a4793146 shows @version attribute node + parsed namespaces).
Already returns (namespace_uri, local) — the parser parses namespaces today; reuse it instead of rejecting.
Sample-XML: rejects namespaced element (UNSUPPORTED_NAMESPACE). Change to record the element's namespace URI.
Sample-XML: `if inst.attrib:` -> 'XML attributes are not supported'. Change to enumerate attributes into attribute child nodes.
XSD: rejects root targetNamespace. Change to capture it as the default namespace for emitted elements.
XSD: rejects namespace-qualified type prefixes. Change to resolve against known schema/XMLSchema URIs.
XSD: rejects xs:attribute at :905-908. Change to collect xs:attribute declarations as attribute nodes; keep rejecting choice/all/any/mixed.
Emission hardcodes <Namespaces><XMLNamespace key=-1 name='Empty Namespace'>. Generate one XMLNamespace per distinct URI with stable integer keys.
Emission hardcodes useNamespace='-1' on every XMLElement. Set useNamespace to the element's namespace key.

Add <XMLAttribute> emission under owning element. CONFIRM exact tag + attribute set (dataType/isMappable/isNode/name/useNamespace/...) against a real Boomi namespaced profile before coding (see assumptions).

#43 contract: profile_config={format:'xml', root:{name,kind:'element',min_occurs,max_occurs,children:[...]}}. Extend node with optional `namespace` {uri,prefix} and allow children of kind:'attribute'; thread into field_index_by_path + mappable_paths.
Secret-named withholding must extend to attributes (SOAP sample had ader:AuthToken + id='tok-1'/SECRETVALUE).

changes: Replace the namespaced-element rejection (:1331) with: record each element's namespace URI (from _split_tag) on the contract node; collect distinct URIs for the document.

Replace the attribute rejection (:1345) with: for each item in inst.attrib, create an attribute child node {name (local), kind:'attribute', data_type (value-inferred char/number/datetime, datetime_detection-aware), required:true, namespace (from attr QName, xmlns:* declarations excluded)}.
Skip xmlns:*/xsi:* declaration pseudo-attributes; map remaining prefixed attribute names to their URI.
Keep rejecting mixed content (text+children) and same-name-ancestor recursion.
Capture root targetNamespace (:1198) as the default element namespace instead of rejecting; record elementFormDefault/attributeFormDefault to decide qualified vs unqualified.

Collect xs:attribute declarations in _xsd_complex_children (:905) as attribute nodes with mapped data types (xs:date->datetime, xs:decimal/int->number, default character); honor use='required'/'optional'.
Resolve namespace-qualified type prefixes (:865) against the schema's xmlns map + the XMLSchema URI; keep rejecting truly foreign/unresolvable refs.
Keep rejecting choice/all/any/anyAttribute/substitution/import/include/extension.
Extend the element node schema with optional `namespace`: {uri, prefix} (absent => empty/default namespace, back-compat).
Accept children with kind:'attribute' (leaf-only, mappable) in addition to kind:'element'.
Emit attribute paths in field_index_by_path using Boomi's '@name' convention (e.g. PurchaseOrder/Customer/@id) and include them in mappable_paths.
Leave DB/JSON paths untouched.
CONFIRMED serialization, golden = analysis/issue47_fidelity/ground_truth/soap.profile.xml.xml:

<Namespaces> = existing <XMLNamespace key='-1' name='Empty Namespace'><Types/></XMLNamespace> PLUS one self-closing <XMLNamespace key=N name=URI prefix=nsN/> per distinct URI (Boomi auto-prefixes ns1/ns2/...; preserves 'xml' for the XML namespace). Namespace keys share the node key counter.
Each <XMLElement> sets useNamespace='<nsKey>' (default '-1').

Attributes emit as <XMLAttribute dataType=.. isMappable='true' isNode='true' key=N name='<local>' required='true|false' useNamespace='<nsKey|-1>'><DataFormat><Profile*Format/></DataFormat></XMLAttribute>, placed inside the owning element BEFORE its child <XMLElement>s; attributes carry NO min/maxOccurs/loopingOption/validateData.

Where an element introduces namespace declarations, emit <XMLNSDeclList><XMLNSDeclaration defaultNamespace='false' isMappable='false' isNode='true' key='<nsKey>'/>...</XMLNSDeclList> right after the element DataFormat (confirm whether required for Boomi acceptance or cosmetic).
Update build_field_index to index attribute nodes (path '@name') so transform.map (#40) can map them.
Extend _is_secret_named withholding to attribute nodes and to namespaced element/attribute local names (the SOAP AuthToken/id case).
Remove/soften the 'element-only', 'namespace-less', 'attributes not supported' caveats once each phase lands; document what IS supported and what remains rejected (mixed/choice/substitution).
Update infer_profile_fields docstring args for profile_from_xsd/profile_from_sample_xml.

public_interfaces: infer_profile_fields(source_type, artifact, options): unchanged signature; profile_from_xsd / profile_from_sample_xml now succeed on attribute/namespace inputs instead of raising. Output gains `namespace` on nodes and kind:'attribute' entries; existing element-only outputs are byte-identical (additive).
structured_errors: Keep PROFILE_INFERENCE_UNSUPPORTED_SHAPE for mixed content / choice / all / any / substitution / anyAttribute.
Narrow PROFILE_INFERENCE_UNSUPPORTED_NAMESPACE to only genuinely unresolvable foreign-prefix references (not all namespaces).
Remove the blanket 'XML attributes are not supported' rejection.

unit: XSD with xs:attribute (required + optional) -> attribute nodes with correct data types + required flags.
XSD with targetNamespace + elementFormDefault=qualified -> elements carry the namespace; emitted profile has matching XMLNamespace/useNamespace.
Sample XML with attributes (no namespace) -> attribute child nodes; value-typed; datetime_detection respected.
SOAP sample (soapenv:/ader: + @version/@employeeId/xml:lang) -> full contract; xmlns:* pseudo-attrs ignored; secret-named (AuthToken/id) withheld.
Regression: existing element-only/namespace-less XSD + sample XML outputs unchanged (golden compare).
fidelity_regression: Promote analysis/issue47_fidelity/compare.py into a repo test: re-run inference->#26 emission for the ZZ_FIDELITY_SOAP-class artifacts and structurally diff against the real Boomi-imported profiles (the ZZ_FIDELITY_* fixtures the user kept in renera, or work-account [Walls] CreateClient with/without namespaces).
negative: Mixed content, choice, substitution group, anyAttribute still return structured rejections.

acceptance_criteria: profile_from_xsd and profile_from_sample_xml accept attribute-bearing and namespaced inputs (incl. an Aderant-style SOAP payload) and produce a contract whose #26-emitted profile.xml is structurally equal to what Boomi's own Import Wizard produces from the same artifact (validated by the fidelity harness).
Attributes appear as Boomi @-style mappable nodes; namespaces appear as XMLNamespace entries with elements referencing them via useNamespace.
Mixed content / choice / substitution / recursion still rejected with actionable structured errors.
Existing element-only namespace-less behavior is byte-for-byte unchanged.
boomi-qa-tester clean (live .fn()), then Codex review clean (per repo CLAUDE.md completion gate).
assumptions: CONFIRMED (was blocking): Boomi serializes attributes as <XMLAttribute> children (placed before child elements; no occurrence attributes) and namespaces as <XMLNamespace key/name/prefix> referenced by each node's useNamespace; xml:lang lands in an auto-added 'xml' namespace, and declaring elements get an <XMLNSDeclList>. Captured from ZZ_FIDELITY_SOAP (a4793146) and ZZ_FIDELITY_XSD (719ca27d) via an authorized direct AtomSphere API call using the repo .env creds (secret never echoed), saved full under analysis/issue47_fidelity/ground_truth/{soap,order_xsd}.profile.xml.xml. The emitter can be written against these golden files.

Phasing is acceptable: P1 attributes-only (no namespace) is the smaller lift and already unblocks many REST/XML payloads; P2 namespaces; P3 combined SOAP. Each phase ships behind the same tool with additive output.
transform.map (#40) can consume attribute field-index entries with the @name path convention without further #40 changes (verify during P1).
Work proceeds on branch issue-47-ns-attr in an isolated worktree (parallel dev in progress on dev).
